helpOutput:
Usage: opencli hackernews ask [options]

Hacker News Ask HN posts

Options:
  --limit [value]     Number of stories (default: "20")
  -f, --format <fmt>  Output format: table, plain, json, yaml, md, csv (default:
                      "table")
  -v, --verbose       Debug output (default: false)
  -h, --help          display help for command

Strategy: public | Browser: no | Domain: news.ycombinator.com
Output columns: rank, title, score, author, comments

  -f, --format <fmt>  Output format: table, plain, json, yaml, md, csv (default:
                      "table")
  -v, --verbose       Debug output (default: false)
  -h, --help          display help for command

Strategy: public | Browser: no | Domain: news.ycombinator.com
Output columns: rank, title, score, author, comments

helpOutput:
Usage: opencli hackernews search [options] <query>

Search Hacker News stories

Arguments:
  query               Search query

Options:
  --limit [value]     Number of results (default: "20")
  --sort [value]      Sort by relevance or date (default: "relevance")
  -f, --format <fmt>  Output format: table, plain, json, yaml, md, csv (default:
                      "table")
  -v, --verbose       Debug output (default: false)
  -h, --help          display help for command

  --sort: relevance, date  (default: relevance)
Strategy: public | Browser: no | Domain: news.ycombinator.com
Output columns: rank, title, score, author, comments, url

payload.title: Vector databases are the wrong abstraction
payload.author: jascha_eng

payload.title: VectorDB: Vector Database Built by Kagi Search

payload.title: Will Amazon S3 Vectors kill vector databases or save them?
